---
title: "Pattern Causality Analysis"
author: "Wenbo Lyu"
date: |
  | Last update: 2026-04-10
  | Last run: `r Sys.Date()`
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{pc}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(pc)
```
